file_summary: README.md is a markdown documentation file for the ItsDangerous Python library. It provides an overview of the library's purpose (securely passing signed data to untrusted environments), includes a simple usage example, and contains sections about donating to the project and contributing.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire visible content of the README.md file. It starts with a centered logo, introduces the ItsDangerous library and its purpose (cryptographically signing data for safe transmission), provides a concrete Python example using URLSafeSerializer to generate and verify a token, and concludes with sections encouraging donations and contributions with relevant links.
